textByHash.13e1515cf3aa6d7db643075eefd69c2a6ae4c358: You have a chance to find them when defeating bosses, playing minigames, and taking part in skilling activities.
textByHash.282b4acb48e1cfbd4f6d7fb75abe2eb48922805e: Every pet you've ever found is automatically insured here!
textByHash.41df4f26844a4eb9573f9d45096597ee8aa2e5c5: What are you on about? I already pay my taxes.
textByHash.584e0cc64c253a1aa485bd2cd2027e189fc7bb3a: You don't need to pay to insure your pet with me. They're automatically insured for free as soon as you find them!
textByHash.69f1f1c9a86e06409c275cc4856907a6a2922ea4: This is a pet insurance bureau. I'm not insuring that.
textByHash.6e2d8650355a92d9886bf8c6221f330384f8dd65: If you've lost your pet, it will be reclaimable here!
textByHash.745de5bb70b52d4fb4013872acb869b9c55c6a22: Welcome to the pet insurance bureau. How can I help you?
textByHash.7941249c506230aa7a782cc2754c9fbfdda4dcfe: I'll make sure people hear about this!
textByHash.7cc3d6e4364555d1bce3bf6e013641a8b377f632: And why would he send some random citizen to tell me this? Stop lying and get out!
textByHash.8549cd3495317b63eb0cc6e15b9898f4cb889d8f: If you do find one, they will be automatically insured against loss, for free!
textByHash.9a6174cd9cd5c9908621374d488cc5413dda9d7b: It's possible there was an error in our records. Let me check again for you.
textByHash.9e94f544acd51ad6468cfd2e9ea4fe38604d1610: And why would he send a mourner to tell me this? Stop lying and get out!
textByHash.a3f5b6ecccf2c9f6287b212c7e024baa4885cd0d: Certainly! You can find pets while out on your adventures. They're very rare, but you may be lucky enough to find one.
textByHash.a8c3d33936ebac41318af6cfab383de36ec5dc7f: If you keep waving money at me, I might take it!
textByHash.aaf821c13af8a0994db12c0eaa23893f21c1432d: Gnomish ornaments? Why can't the king pay for his own ornaments? He's got enough money as it is!
textByHash.cc0bd3c1a577eb3f0c690fc776120d66f4ca439d: If you then somehow lose your pet, you can reclaim it here for free also. The service used to cost Reclaim tokens worth 1,000,000 coins each. If you have any of those, I can refund you.
textByHash.ce5151cc38962a4fda5ec89a3871078762781e39: us know and we will buy them back.
textByHash.eeb05b290ed95d60e0cc2fe43114aad533c3a3dc: If you lose a pet somehow, you can come here and reclaim them. It used to cost reclaim tokens, although we're now subsidised by the Grand Exchange and the service is free. If you have any reclaim tokens left, let
